title: EVA Mecha Designs
wikitext:
[]: EVA Mecha Designs             Quote Post by pen-pen » Tue Apr 26, 2011 1:33 am Don't get me wrong- I love all the EVA series mecha designs. From before, they are revolutionary ideas... Only lately I'm a LI...TTLE bit sick of it. The EVA 06 is only slightly different from the series... I think it should be weirder in concept... The only outstanding one at the moment is EVA 05.....

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Apr 26, 2011 1:36 am Mark 06 is deliberately similar in design to Unit 01, probably to hint at some deeper similarity between them. Unit 08 looks like it's going to be pretty unusual, though, and we don't have any idea what Unit 07 is going to look like...

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Tue Apr 26, 2011 1:50 am I guess I need to elaborate on my first comment... When I said a LI...TTLE bit sick of the designs I meant the super slender body parts for the newer series.... only the heads are visibly different. EVA 05 however has scratch-your-head-out-of-this-world design on the lower part of the body & pirate themed arms..... I do hope the EVA 08 will be more different.....

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Tue Apr 26, 2011 8:18 am Who wants to see a chubby EVA?

[]: Re: EVA Mecha Designs             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Apr 26, 2011 8:44 am pen-pen wrote: The only outstanding one at the moment is EVA 05.....

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Apr 26, 2011 10:09 am ^ But they still look humanoid enough to be EVAs, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Apr 26, 2011 11:19 am EVA 06 probably DELIBERATELY looks like EVA 01, so that both sorta messiac figures have matching mechas. Also, Rebuild implies they might be SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Tue Apr 26, 2011 11:28 am Kendrix wrote: Also, Rebuild implies they might be SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Apr 26, 2011 11:32 am Shogo-Kun wrote: Does this mean my theory about EVA-01 merely wanting a friend will be proven correct? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Tue Apr 26, 2011 2:13 pm While the idea of a Daishi or an Ares slugging it out with an Angel does fill me with an emotion similar to glee, and I have myself made alternate bio-mech designs for FBL , I think the idea of using too radically different designs undercuts the whole point that the Evas aren't mechs. The Evas are human, and they should look human, after all.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Apr 26, 2011 4:51 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: Who wants to see a chubby EVA?

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Tue Apr 26, 2011 9:16 pm I was thinking more of something like this(below)...extracted from the Evangelion Anima Ikuto Yamashita ideas SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Apr 26, 2011 10:16 pm pen-pen wrote: I was thinking more of something like this(below)...extracted from the Evangelion Anima Ikuto Yamashita ideas SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Tue Apr 26, 2011 10:41 pm Okay, forget a chubby EVA! EVA Wolf FTMFW!!!

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Apr 27, 2011 10:34 am You guys are kinda forgetting the most important thing in that whole "brothers" theory. We´ll get to see some uber-moe Shinji Nii-chan calling action.

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Wed Apr 27, 2011 7:53 pm Cody MacArthur Fett wrote: While the idea of a Daishi or an Ares slugging it out with an Angel does fill me with an emotion similar to glee, and I have myself made alternate bio-mech designs for FBL , I think the idea of using too radically different designs undercuts the whole point that the Evas aren't mechs. The Evas are human, and they should look human, after all.

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Wed Apr 27, 2011 8:01 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: Okay, forget a chubby EVA! EVA Wolf FTMFW!!!

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Wed Apr 27, 2011 9:12 pm pen-pen wrote: I totally get the human thing... but when they get into Bezerk mode & go on all fours chewing & munching on wholesome Angels, they didn't look or act human at all... So that's I was thinking the designs should be more menacing or 'creature-like'....

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Wed Apr 27, 2011 9:26 pm rhfxz1s wrote: But that's the entire point. The first thing I thought of when I saw that "wolf EVA" posted earlier was the famous beserker scene in episode 19. When Unit-01 got onto four legs and began to act like a savage beast, it was an extremely powerful scene, supposed to represent the destructive nature of the Evas underneath their seemingly orderly and maintained appearance. Having an Eva that simply looked "creature-like" all the time would really take away from that.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Wed Apr 27, 2011 9:46 pm An Eva with four arms (like Rebuild Bardiel-possessed Unit 03) would be interesting.
summary:
[]: EVA Mecha Designs             Quote Post by pen-pen » Tue Apr 26, 2011 1:33 am Don't get me wrong- I love all the EVA series mecha designs. From before, they are revolutionary ideas... Only lately I'm a LI...TTLE bit sick of it. The EVA 06 is only slightly different from the series... I think it should be weirder in concept... The only outstanding one at the moment is EVA 05.....
